name: Lights-Out Development Pipeline
description_en: A fixed 9-phase Claude Code workflow that turns one request into shipped code — spec, design, architecture, consistency, test design, implementation, QA, E2E, and a final verification loop, each with adversarial write→review→fix cycles.
description_zh: 固定 9 阶段的 Claude Code 工作流，把一句需求变成可交付代码——依次走规格、设计、架构、一致性、测试设计、实现、QA、端到端验证与最终核查循环，每个产物都经过独立的「写→评审→修」对抗式回路。
long_en: Orchestrates a linear pipeline of supervised subagents (spec-writer/reviewer, ux-designer, architect, consistency-reviewer, test-case-designer, code-agent, qa-engineer, bug-fixer, visual-qa) that each read role prompts from ~/.claude/lights-out/prompts. Documents (spec/design/architecture/test-cases) are written to docs/ and re-reviewed up to MAX_ROUNDS; QA and E2E run bounded fix loops, and a frozen-gap final check verifies completeness, correctness, and coherence of code against docs.
long_zh: 编排一条线性的受监督子代理流水线（spec-writer/reviewer、ux-designer、architect、consistency-reviewer、test-case-designer、code-agent、qa-engineer、bug-fixer、visual-qa），各自从 ~/.claude/lights-out/prompts 读取角色提示。规格/设计/架构/测试用例文档写入 docs/ 并按 MAX_ROUNDS 反复评审；QA 与端到端各跑有上限的修复循环，最后用「冻结缺陷清单」的终检验证代码相对文档的完整性、正确性与一致性。
sec_note_en: A Claude Code Agent Workflow (.js): it spawns many autonomous subagents that run shell, edit files, make git commits, and drive a real browser via Playwright in the E2E phase, with no human gate between phases. It depends on external role-prompt files installed at ~/.claude/lights-out/prompts (via the repo install.sh) — without them the agents lack instructions. Run only on a project you intend to let it modify, ideally a fresh git checkout.
sec_note_zh: 这是 Claude Code Agent Workflow（.js）：它会派生大量自主子代理，执行 shell、改写文件、提交 git，并在端到端阶段通过 Playwright 操控真实浏览器，阶段之间没有人工把关。依赖安装在 ~/.claude/lights-out/prompts 的外部角色提示文件（由仓库 install.sh 安装），缺失则代理无指令可循。请只在你愿意让它改动的项目上运行，最好是全新的 git 检出。
